title: Griffitharia lanata

intro: Griffitharia lanata, also known as woolly Griffithia, is a succulent plant species native to Australia, characterized by its woolly, white-haired leaves and stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its potential antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
